ModMetaData.name: 轻松环世界 - easyrim
ModMetaData.author: Passion=Life
ModMetaData.description:
轻松环世界 - 超强特性模组 / EasyRim - Overpowered Colony Enhancements
[中文] 这是一个让环世界更轻松的功能增强模组，聚焦于殖民者强化与玩法提速。
主要内容项： - 殖民者特性 - 能力系统（战斗、治疗、复活、传送、动员等） - 状态增强（超越系列、自适应护甲、狂战士之血、血液血红素等） - 心情效果 - 合成配方（含中性胺与批量组件） - 建筑内容 - 平衡补丁 - 中英本地化
警告：这是超强化模组，会显著降低游戏难度。
[English] This is a gameplay-easing enhancement mod for RimWorld, focused on pawn power-ups and faster progression.
Content includes: - Pawn traits - Ability system (combat, healing, resurrection, teleportation, rally) - Hediff-based buffs (Transcendence set, Adaptive Armor, Berserker Blood, Blood Hemogen, etc.) - Mood effects - Crafting recipes (including neutroamine and batch components) - Building content - Balance patches - Chinese & English localization
Warning: This is an overpowered mod and can make the game much easier.
Supported version: RimWorld 1.6 (Odyssey) GitHub: https://github.com/ledshic/easyrim
